Package ecarx.carext.vehicle

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    CarConfigWord
    配置字接口 以红旗获取OMS配置字为例 配置字表格地址: https://ecarxgroup.feishu.cn/sheets/EekNs9JTHhY6u9tK5VecEoEQngd?sheet=1IOIaV API Byte StartBit BitLength Comment OMS 1 7 1 成员状态监测(OMS)硬件配置

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    CarExt  
    CarExtModule  
    Id2ModuleIndexer  
    VehicleAreaDoor
    VehicleAreaDoor is an abstraction for a door in a car.
    VehicleAreaMirror
    VehicleAreaMirror is an abstraction for a mirror in a car.
    VehicleAreaSeat
    Object used to indicate the area value for car properties which have area type VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT.
    VehicleAreaType  
    VehicleAreaWheel
    Object used to indicate area value for car properties which have area type VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_WHEEL.
    VehicleAreaWindow
    VehicleAreaWindow is an abstraction for a window in a car.
    VehiclePropertyType
